events.title: PM Summit 2026 (Virtual)
events.description: PM Summit 2026 virtual conference (All-Access Pass). Event dates: April 7–8, 2026. All times listed are in Pacific Time (PT). Access via Hopin (no download required): https://hopin.com/events/pmsummit2026. Login email: david.lee@example.com. Platform opens 30 minutes before each day starts. Day 1 schedule highlights: 9:00 AM Opening Keynote; 10:30 AM Track Sessions Begin; 12:00 PM Lunch Break & Networking; 1:00 PM Afternoon Sessions; 4:00 PM Day 1 Closing Panel. Day 2 schedule highlights: 9:00 AM Day 2 Kickoff; 9:30 AM Workshop Sessions; 12:00 PM Lunch Break; 1:00 PM Afternoon Sessions; 3:30 PM Closing Keynote; 4:30 PM Summit Concludes. Sessions recorded and available for 90 days.

events.title: PM Summit 2026 — Opening Keynote: “The Future of Product”
events.description: Day 1 Opening Keynote at 9:00 AM PT. Talk: “The Future of Product” — CEO, ProductCo. Access via Hopin: https://hopin.com/events/pmsummit2026 (login: david.lee@example.com).
